title: Simple Structure: Bewitchment
description: This modification adds 10 structures to the world for the Bewitchment mod
body:
This modification adds 10 structures to the world for the **Bewitchment** mod. The work requires [Bewitchment](https://modrinth.com/mod/bewitchment) 


![structures from the datapack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7293d4d2f66176ad0b9832b466227bbead6bb62e.png)

![structures from the datapack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/59fc4fe5497522a21613d3f63152c064453c0e5d.png)

_______________________________________________________________________________________________
### [All projects are Simple Structures](https://modrinth.com/collection/vinouI3O)

__________________________________________________________________________________________
All projects for modification [Bewitchment](https://modrinth.com/mod/bewitchment):

[Simple Structure: Bewitchment](https://modrinth.com/datapack/simplestructure-bewitchment)

[Village for Bewitchment](https://modrinth.com/project/village-for-bewitchment)
_______________________________________________________________________________________________
**License** - you can use the data pack materials in any of your projects, just specify the authorship.


_______________________________________________________________________________________________
**AI** - only the project icon was generated
